16042.title: Call the Midwife
16042.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

16043.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : In My Memory Lock'd
16043.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

16044.title: Sanditon
16044.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

16045.title: The Kettering Incident : Anna
16045.description: Anna Macy left Kettering when she was just 14, shortly after her best friend disappeared in the forest. When Anna returns 15 years later, the town is struggling to survive.

16046.title: Impossible
16046.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

16051.title: Bargain Hunt : Newbury 6
16051.description: Charlie Ross is at the Newbury Showground, where experts David Harper and John Cameron assist two teams of friends at an Antiques and Collectors Fair. Charlie takes a trip down memory lane with a Mini Cooper S, before a short journey to the Auction where Thomas Plant is on the rostrum. At the end of it all will either team be driving home with any profits?

16052.title: Casualty
16052.description: Marty's family life crashes around him as he confronts a familiar face, and Jacob realises the true extent of his feelings for Tina.

16053.title: Father Brown : The Sins of Others
16053.description: Father Brown struggles to save Sid from himself when he vows vengeance on his former defence barrister.

16054.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 18
16054.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire, with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of friends take on each other to buy three items that they hope will make a profit at auction. They all have their sights on a golden gavel but only one team will achieve their goal.

16058.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 29
16058.description: The bargain hunters are racing around the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Charlie Ross is in the driving seat and he is joined by experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant. Before heading over to the auction in Lichfield, Charlie has a pit stop to find out about the fascinating military history of Cannock Chase.

16063.title: Bad Move : Shut Up
16063.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

16064.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Senior Citizen's Outing

16067.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home : Newquay
16067.description: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, Cornwall. When Gareth and Frances Jenkins bought an ugly-looking pebble-dashed bungalow, they had little idea of the house's astonishing history.
16067.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen

16068.title: Doctors : The Good, the Bad and the Blood Pressurey

16069.title: EastEnders
16069.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

16070.title: Bargain Hunt : Lincoln 6
16070.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

21174.title: The Kettering Incident : Madness
21174.description: The town is in crisis with the discovery of toxic water. Anna is questioned by Fergus and Dutch after her fingerprints are discovered on evidence relating to the crime scene.
